simple_types.name: hqc_ciphertext
simple_types.code:
type hqc_ciphertext  is private
    with Preelaborable_Initialization;

simple_types.name: hqc_private_key
simple_types.code:
type hqc_private_key is private
    with Preelaborable_Initialization;

simple_types.name: hqc_public_key
simple_types.code:
type hqc_public_key  is private
    with Preelaborable_Initialization;

simple_types.name: hqc_shared_key
simple_types.code:
type hqc_shared_key  is private
    with Preelaborable_Initialization;

subprograms.name: get_hqc_ciphertext
subprograms.code: function    get_hqc_ciphertext  (from_ciphertext    :   aliased hqc_ciphertext) return Interfaces.C.char_array

subprograms.name: get_hqc_private_key
subprograms.code: function    get_hqc_private_key (from_key   :   aliased hqc_private_key)    return Interfaces.C.char_array

subprograms.name: get_hqc_public_key
subprograms.code: function    get_hqc_public_key  (from_key   :   aliased hqc_public_key) return Interfaces.C.char_array

subprograms.name: get_hqc_shared_key
subprograms.code: function    get_hqc_shared_key  (from_key   :   aliased hqc_shared_key) return Interfaces.C.char_array
